9:["$","$L16",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne()\nstream = mem.stream\n\nmem.remember(\"test memory\")\n\n# Pull via callback\nstream.on_event(lambda event: print(f\"Event: {event.type}\"))\n\n# Pull via iterator\nfor event in stream:\n  process(event)\n","language":"python"}]

c:["$","$L16",null,{"code":"mem_a = Mnemosyne(session_id=\"agent-a\")\nmem_b = Mnemosyne(session_id=\"agent-b\")\n\n# Compute and apply delta\ndelta = mem_a.delta_sync.compute_delta()\nmem_b.delta_sync.apply_delta(delta)\n\n# Bidirectional sync\nmem_a.delta_sync.sync_to(mem_b)\nmem_a.delta_sync.sync_from(mem_b)\n","language":"python"}]
